task_completion.description: Agent navigated to the required educational standards websites.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser (Microsoft Edge) is open with one or more of the target URLs (nextgenscience.org, corestandards.org, iste.org, nces.ed.gov) visible in the address bar or tabs.

task_completion.description: Agent created a Collection named 'STEM Standards Review'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser's Collections sidebar (usually on the right) is open and displays a collection titled exactly 'STEM Standards Review'.

task_completion.description: Agent added the four required sources to the Collection.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the 'STEM Standards Review' collection in the sidebar, there are saved links, items, or cards corresponding to the four required websites (Next Generation Science Standards, Common Core, ISTE, and NCES).

task_completion.description: Agent created the required reference document on the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor window is open editing a file named 'stem_standards_reference.txt', or the file icon is clearly visible on the Desktop.

task_completion.description: The reference document includes sections and URLs for each organization.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The visible text in the editor contains sections for all four organizations, explicitly listing their URLs (nextgenscience.org, corestandards.org, iste.org, nces.ed.gov).

task_completion.description: The reference document includes descriptions of coverage for each organization.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The visible text in the editor includes a brief synthesized description or summary of what each of the four educational standards covers.

integrity.description: Agent used the browser GUI to create the Collection.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Edge browser and its Collections sidebar are visible in the screenshots, proving the agent interacted with the UI rather than using terminal commands to modify the Edge SQLite database directly.

integrity.description: Agent used a text editor to write the reference document.
integrity.visual_evidence: A graphical text editor (like gedit, mousepad, or similar) is visible on screen with the document contents, rather than the agent solely using terminal commands like 'echo' or 'cat' to generate the file.

integrity.description: Agent synthesized genuine descriptions rather than using placeholders.
integrity.visual_evidence: The descriptions in the text file contain actual, relevant information about the standards (e.g., mentioning science, math/ELA, technology, or education statistics), indicating genuine research rather than placeholder text or copy-pasting the task prompt.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target domains to verify: nextgenscience.org, corestandards.org, iste.org, nces.ed.gov. Required Edge Collection name: 'STEM Standards Review'. Output file path: /home/ga/Desktop/stem_standards_reference.txt. The text file must contain sections for each of the four organizations, including their URL and a brief description of their coverage.
